name: Heron
_doc: Endurance ISR airframe (docs/03): low ceiling, slow, deliberate approvals. Forces profile-reading (its 50 m/s ceiling rejects a brain that hardcoded AX-01's Speed:60) and exercises the PENDING->APPROVED control flow (approvalLatencyTicks 3).

fuel._doc: U-shaped fuel flow: floor 4 kg/tick at bestSpeed 32 (just above the 25 stall), rising quadratically — gently toward the stall, steeply toward 50. Full tank 1000 kg easily covers the short HSA missions (1.3/4.5); Bingo issues a thin start.fuel so an unsustainable speed trips the endurance reserve.
